title: FMDPZUP Large Gift Bags,4 Pack Christmas Tote Bags with Gold Tree Handle Non-woven Fabric Present Bag,41 * 30 * 18cm Xmas Reusable Shopping Bag
features: 【Package Includes】4pcs extra-large Christmas gift total bags，they are the same color and size. The size of Christmas Non-Woven Bags is 41*30*18cm.Meeting the needs of Christmas gift packaging and daily shopping.

【Practical Material】Our Xmas bags is made of high-quality non-woven fabric, which is very practical. It is firm, waterproof and reusable. Our Christmas tote bag is a perfect substitute for paper bags, plastic bags and baskets.It is very suitable for Christmas party.

【High-Grade Design】Christmas gift bags has a unique design. The pattern of the Christmas Non-Woven bag is luxury and high-grade.The blue gift bag is printed with a gold tree and a gift box on the snow.

【Application】These jumbo carry-all bags are FABULOUS!! Perfect for carrying a container of cookies, treat, candy or other Christmas gifts for giving to teachers, friends family or neighbors. Great for favor, goody or a thank you prese.

【Useful】Christmas gift bags are lightweight and portable, with sturdy handles, easy to carry, bright colors and long-lasting durability.These bags make gift-giving easy. Instead of wrapping your gifts, just put them into these spacious bags, add some tissue paper, and you're ready to give them.
description: FMDPZUP Christmas Tote Bags ,4 Pack Large Christmas Bags with Handle Non-woven Fabric Gift Present Bag,Gold Reusable Xmas Shopping Bag for Holiday Party
